member.name: P:Classes.My.Resources.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Classes.My.Resources.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: T:Classes.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Classes.formDataEntry.formMode
member.summary: Contains the current status of the form (New, Edit, Cancel)

member.name: P:Classes.formDataEntry.askBeforeSave
member.summary: set to true if user response is required before saving the data in the form

member.name: P:Classes.formDataEntry.userResponseToSave
member.summary: User's reponse to the save messagebox

member.name: M:Classes.formDataEntry.LoadData(System.String)
member.summary: Place the code to load the data from the database

member.name: M:Classes.formDataEntry.LoadData(System.Int32)
member.summary: Place the code to load the data from the database

member.name: M:Classes.formDataEntry.NewRecord
member.summary: Place the code to set the form for new record.

member.name: M:Classes.formDataEntry.CheckDataChanges
member.summary: Place the code to check if the data changes in the form. Return true if modified and False if not modified

member.name: M:Classes.formDataEntry.AskToSave
member.summary: Get user response before save data in the form

member.name: M:Classes.formDataEntry.SaveRecord
member.summary: Place the code to send the data to the database. If successful return true else return false

member.name: M:Classes.formDataEntry.EndAllEdits
member.summary: Place the code to EndEdit all datatables in the form

member.name: M:Classes.formDataEntry.PrintRecord
member.summary: Place the code to Print the current document / report

member.name: M:Classes.formDataEntry.CancelRecord
member.summary: Place the code to cancel the current document. Return True if cancel is successful , False otherwise

member.name: M:Classes.formDataEntry.SearchRecord
member.summary: Place the code to search and retrive the record of the main document. Return True if cancel is successful , False otherwise

member.name: M:Classes.formDataEntry.SetDataBindings
member.summary: Place the code to bind the data from the database to the form controls

member.name: M:Classes.formDataEntry.ClearDataBindings
member.summary: Place the code to clear the existing data bindings of all controls in the form

member.name: M:Classes.formDataEntry.RefreshForm
member.summary: Refreshes the data in the form

member.name: M:Classes.formDataEntry.RefreshToolBar
member.summary: Place the code to enable / disable toolbar based on menuid / other conditions inside the form

member.name: M:Classes.formDataEntry.RefreshLookupControls
member.summary: Place the code to populate all look up controls (combobox, listbox, grids etc.)

member.name: M:Classes.formDataEntry.DeleteRecord
member.summary: Place the code to delete the current record. Return True if delete is successful , False otherwise

member.name: M:Classes.formDataEntry.CopyRecord
member.summary: Place the code to copy the current record and create a new one. Return True if delete is successful , False otherwise

member.name: P:Classes.formBase.userInfo
member.summary: Userinfo Object of the current user

member.name: P:Classes.formBase.menuID
member.summary: Menuid of the current form
